revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Today/旧暦/CE/AH]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Today/旧暦/CE/AH]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Template:Today/CE/SH/AH]]に倣って作成
1 revision imported: importing stuff
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Today/旧暦/CE/AH]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Today/旧暦/CE/AH]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "#redirect[[en:Template" to "#redirect[[:en:Template"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Today/旧暦/CE/AH]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Today/旧暦/CE/AH]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing the logic of this that is used to find the current date
1 revision imported: importing the full history for attribution
Adding [[Category:qq]][[ja:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]" to "[[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]]"
Text replacement - "今日の節気" to "SOLAR TERM TODAY"
Bot: mark ja import issue
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Text replacement - "今日の干支" to "Current Sexagenary"
Text replacement - "今日の二十八宿" to "Twenty-Eight Mansions Today"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "Today/旧暦/CE/AH" to "Today/Lunisolar/CE/AH"
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Today/旧暦/CE/AH]] to [[Template:Today/Lunisolar/CE/AH]]: Text replacement - "Today/旧暦/CE/AH" to "Today/Lunisolar/CE/AH"
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Today/Lunisolar/CE/AH]]

revision.comment: 2 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:Template:Today/旧暦/CE/AH up to rev 90774943
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Today/Lunisolar/CE/AH]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Today/旧暦/CE/AH]] to [[Template:Today/Lunisolar/CE/AH]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Today/Lunisolar/CE/AH]]

revision.comment: Bot: restore translated version
Adding [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
getting rid of category cruft for potential import to simple english wikipedia All categories go to [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]]
replacing the interwikis
Copying from [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] to [[Category:Date-computing templates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Sidebar | name = Today/Lunisolar/CE/AH | bodystyle = width:auto;border:1px solid #ccc;background:#fff;border-right:3px solid #ccc;border-bottom:3px solid #ccc;text-align:center;padding:3px;float:right;font-size:smaller;margin-right:4px; | abovestyle = padding:0 0 0.1em;background:#aaa;color:#f9f9f9; | above = Today
[[:en:Japan Standard Time|Japan Standard Time]]（UTC+9） | contentclass = plainlist | contentstyle = line-height:1.6em;white-space:nowrap; | content1style = padding-top:0.25em; | content1 = * [[{{Current Sexagenary English}}]] ({{Current Sexagenary}})・{{Twenty-Eight Mansions Today}}・{{DAYOFWEEK}} ---- * {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|lt=Lunisolar}} {{Lunisolar Today}} * ({{SOLAR TERM TODAY}}) ---- * [[:en:Gregorian calendar|CE]] [[{{CURRENTYEAR}}]], [[{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}]] [[{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}|{{CURRENTDAY}}]] ---- * [[:en:Islamic calendar|AH]] {{Islamic Today}} ---- * [[:en:Julian day|JD]] {{CURRENTJULIANDAY}} ---- * {{CURRENTTIME-JST}} ---- [{{Purge|Purge}}] | navbar = none }} [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] {{translated page|ja|Template:Today/旧暦/CE/AH|version=90774943|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] to [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]][[Category:Date-computing templates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Sidebar | name = Today/Lunisolar/CE/AH | bodystyle = width:auto;border:1px solid #ccc;background:#fff;border-right:3px solid #ccc;border-bottom:3px solid #ccc;text-align:center;padding:3px;float:right;font-size:smaller;margin-right:4px; | abovestyle = padding:0 0 0.1em;background:#aaa;color:#f9f9f9; | above = Today
[[:en:Japan Standard Time|Japan Standard Time]]（UTC+9） | contentclass = plainlist | contentstyle = line-height:1.6em;white-space:nowrap; | content1style = padding-top:0.25em; | content1 = * [[{{Current Sexagenary English}}]] ({{Current Sexagenary}})・{{Twenty-Eight Mansions Today}}・{{DAYOFWEEK}} ---- * {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|lt=Lunisolar}} {{Lunisolar Today}} * ({{SOLAR TERM TODAY}}) ---- * [[:en:Gregorian calendar|CE]] [[{{CURRENTYEAR}}]], [[{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}]] [[{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}|{{CURRENTDAY}}]] ---- * [[:en:Islamic calendar|AH]] {{Islamic Today}} ---- * [[:en:Julian day|JD]] {{CURRENTJULIANDAY}} ---- * {{CURRENTTIME-JST}} ---- [{{Purge|Purge}}] | navbar = none }} [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]][[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]][[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]][[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]][[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]][[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]][[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]][[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]][[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] {{translated page|ja|Template:Today/旧暦/CE/AH|version=90774943|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Sidebar | name = Today/Lunisolar/CE/AH | bodystyle = width:auto;border:1px solid #ccc;background:#fff;border-right:3px solid #ccc;border-bottom:3px solid #ccc;text-align:center;padding:3px;float:right;font-size:smaller;margin-right:4px; | abovestyle = padding:0 0 0.1em;background:#aaa;color:#f9f9f9; | above = Today

[[{{Current Sexagenary English}}]] ({{Current Sexagenary}})・{{Twenty-Eight Mansions Today}}・{{DAYOFWEEK}} ---- * {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar {{CURRENTJULIANDAY}} ---- * {{CURRENTTIME-JST}} ---- [{{Purge|Purge}}] | navbar = none }} [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]][[Category:Japanese Time revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Sidebar | name = Today/Lunisolar/CE/AH | bodystyle = width:auto;border:1px solid #ccc;background:#fff;border-right:3px solid #ccc;border-bottom:3px solid #ccc;text-align:center;padding:3px;float:right;font-size:smaller;margin-right:4px; | abovestyle = padding:0 0 0.1em;background:#aaa;color:#f9f9f9; | above = Today
[[:en:Japan Standard Time|Japan Standard Time]]（UTC+9） | contentclass = plainlist | contentstyle = line-height:1.6em;white-space:nowrap; | content1style = padding-top:0.25em; | content1 = * [[{{Current Sexagenary English}}]] ({{Current Sexagenary}})・{{Twenty-Eight Mansions Today}}・{{DAYOFWEEK}} ---- * {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lt=Lunisolar}} {{Lunisolar Today}} * ({{SOLAR TERM TODAY}}) ---- * [[:en:Gregorian calendar|CE]] [[{{CURRENTYEAR}}]], [[{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}]] [[{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}|{{CURRENTDAY}}]] ---- * [[:en:Islamic calendar|AH]] {{Islamic Today}} ---- * [[:en:Julian day|JD]] {{CURRENTJULIANDAY}} ---- * {{CURRENTTIME-JST}} ---- [{{Purge|Purge}}] | navbar = none }} [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]][[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]]
